block_00: Data hataane ka anurodh prapt hua
block_02: Hum aapke account aur aapke sabhi vyaktigat data ko hatane ke aapke anurodh ke prapti ki pushti karte hain. Kripya dhyaan den ki aapke vyaktigat jaanakaari humare liye bahut mahatvapurn hai aur
block_04: data suraksha ko bahut gambhirata se leta hai.
block_05: Hum aapke vyaktigat data ko hatane ke aapke anurodh par saharsh kaarravai karenge, jahaan bhi aapka anurodh maany hai aur laagu kaanunon aur viniyamon ke anusaar hai.
block_06: Hum apne anurodh par karwai karenge aur aapko tees (30) kaary divason ke bhitar antim pratikriya pradaan karenge.
block_07: Humare systems aamtaur par aavashyakta aur data nyunikaran siddhant ka paalan karne ke liye configure kiye gaye hain. Iska matlab yah hai ki
block_09: aapke kissi bhi vyaktigat data ko sansaadhit nahin karta hai jo aapko humari sevaen pradaan karne ke liye bilkul jaruri nahin hai.
block_10: Yadi aap apna anurodh rad karna chaahte hain, to aap us samay humare website ke maadhyam se aisa karne me saksham hain jab aapka anurodh prakriyadheen hai. Humare systems dvaara vartamaan me sansaadhit kiye ja rahe anurodhon ke maatra ke aadhar par aapke anurodh ko sansaadhit karne me 1 se 30 kaaryadivas lag sakte hain.
block_11: Hatane ke aapke anurodh ko radd karne ke prabhaav:
block_13: Aap apne account tak pahunch sakenge, trade kar sakenge aur
block_15: sevaon ka upyog kar sakenge; aur
block_16: Aapka vyaktigat data hataya nahin jayega.
block_17: Uprokt kahne ke baad, hum aapko suchit karte hain ki aapke paas apne khaate tak simit pahunch hogi aur aap keval apne uplabdh shesh raashi (yadi koi ho) ki nikaasi ke liye nikaasi aur dhanavaapsi neti ke anusaar nikasi anurodh submit karne me saksham honge (shesh rashi)).
block_18: iski tithi se 14 dinon ki samaapti par, aapka khaata puri tarah se avaruddh kar diya jayega, aapke paas iska koi adhikaar nahin hoga aur shesh raashi ka sheershak company ko sthanaantarit kar diya jayega.
block_22: Yadi aapke koi prashn hain, to aap humse sampark kar sakte hain
